series.curator_notes: The Hexe Lilli series has a complex release history with multiple sub-lines: (1) Main numbered episodes 1-24 with standard format (~40 tracks), (2) EUROPA mini/primo releases - shorter compilations with 2 stories per album, no episode numbers, (3) Erstlesergeschichten (beginner reader stories) - a separate educational line for young readers. Only the main numbered episodes are included. Note: Episode 9 exists in two versions - the main '009/und das magische Schwert' and an Erstlesergeschichten version which is excluded.

review.notes: Auto-approved: no gaps or duplicates found.

verification.concerns: I was unable to fully verify using the Spotify API due to IDs appearing incomplete or not found - this appears to be a data issue with the IDs passed to me rather than a curation issue. The excluded items are all correctly categorized: the "Erstlesergeschichten" are beginner reader versions (different format, shorter), the EUROPA mini releases are shorter 2-story compilations, and there are movie tie-ins and special releases appropriately excluded. The 24 included episodes follow the expected pattern (Folge 1-24) and have consistent naming conventions for the Hexe Lilli series. The curation logic appears sound.
